(b) d_app sub-sorry at L624 gained a successful `change (CommRingCat.KaehlerDifferential.D _).d _ = 0` scaffold that beta-reduces the goal into the clean factoring-through-φ_G form, plus a 16-line closure-recipe docstring (combine `(fst G G).w` + `(snd G G).w` + `LocallyRingedSpace.comp_c_app` + adjunction-transpose to get the witness `h`); the categorical-chase body remains `sorry`. (c) d_map sub-sorry at L643: a parallel `change`-based attempt caused a deterministic `whnf` timeout at maxHeartbeats=200000 (the RHS `((pushforward ψ).obj LHS).map f` is opaque to `whnf`), so the `change` was reverted and only the 18-line closure-recipe docstring (ψ-naturality from `NatTrans.naturality` + `relativeDifferentials'_map_d` + `pushforward = pushforward₀ ∘ restrictScalars` transparency) was committed.

attempts.code_tried: Add `import Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Functor.ReflectsIso.Balanced` + add `private theorem isIso_of_app_iso_module {C : Type*} [Category C] {R : Cᵒᵖ ⥤ RingCat} {M N : PresheafOfModules R} (f : M ⟶ N) (h : ∀ X, IsIso (f.app X)) : IsIso f := by rw [← isIso_iff_of_reflects_iso _ (PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf R), NatTrans.isIso_iff_isIso_app]; intro X; exact Functor.map_isIso (forget₂ (ModuleCat _) AddCommGrpCat) (f.app X)`. Replace `letI : IsIso (basechange_along_proj_two_inv G) := sorry` with `letI : IsIso (basechange_along_proj_two_inv G) := isIso_of_app_iso_module (basechange_along_proj_two_inv G) (fun _ => sorry)`.
attempts.insight: Substantive structural advance: the IsIso sorry is now narrowed from a whole-morphism iso (opaque) to a per-open ModuleCat-morphism iso (chart-localised, attackable via `tensorKaehlerEquiv.symm` + chart-unfolding). The 5-line bridge helper is upstream-PR candidate (mirrors `Scheme.Modules.Hom.isIso_iff_isIso_app` in `Mathlib/AlgebraicGeometry/Modules/Sheaf.lean:132` for the `PresheafOfModules` variant). The `import` needed (`Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Functor.ReflectsIso.Balanced`) was the iter-139 analogist's critical caveat — confirmed needed for `(PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf R).ReflectsIsomorphisms` synthesis.

(2) d_map — implement the 3-step chase: (i) ψ-naturality from `NatTrans.naturality`; (ii) Mathlib lemma `relativeDifferentials'_map_d`; (iii) leverage `pushforward = pushforward₀ ∘ restrictScalars` transparency (~30–60 LOC). (3) IsIso per-open — build `pullbackObjEquivTensor` helper first (~30–60 LOC), then the chart-level `Algebra.IsPushout`-from-affine-product helper (~80–150 LOC), then apply `tensorKaehlerEquiv_symm_D_tmul` for the value identity (~50–100 LOC) — total ~160–310 LOC.
